examples: Can you enlighten me--I don't understand this proposal

meanings.definition: give spiritual insight to; in religion
make free from confusion or ambiguity; make clear
examples: Clear up the question of who is at fault

meanings.definition: tending to increase knowledge or dissipate ignorance
examples: an enlightening glimpse of government in action

meanings.definition: enlightening or uplifting so as to encourage intellectual or moral improvement
examples: the paintings in the church served an edifying purpose even for those who could not read
